import { MutationFilters, QueryClient, MutationState, Mutation } from '@tanstack/query-core'; declare function useIsMutating(filters?: MutationFilters, queryClient?: QueryClient): number; type MutationStateOptions<TResult = MutationState> = { filters?: MutationFilters; select?: (mutation: Mutation) => TResult; }; declare function useMutationState<TResult = MutationState>(options?: MutationStateOptions<TResult>, queryClient?: QueryClient): Array<TResult>; export { useIsMutating, useMutationState };
